headline: EG Stock Trading at a Discount to Industry at 0.9X: Time to Hold?
summary: Everest Group's reinsurance strength, rising investment income, and global expansion fuel growth as it scales operations and boosts shareholder returns.

headline: Bank of America and Mizuho Cut AIG Price Targets, Maintain Neutral Ratings
summary: American International Group, Inc. (NYSE:AIG) is included among the 12 High Dividend Stocks Picked by Billionaire Ray Dalio. On April 14, Bank of America analyst Joshua Shanker lowered the firm’s price recommendation on American International Group, Inc. (NYSE:AIG) to $79 from $80. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares. The firm adjusted its price […]
